# Copilot Instructions

- Respect Tradara's business rules: billing state is the source of truth, Telegram is delivery only.
- Never use guaranteed-profit, risk-free, or safe-profit language.
- Validate inbound external payloads with Zod before business logic runs.
- Do not bypass webhook verification or idempotency checks.
- Keep services modular and keep controllers thin.
- Add or update tests for critical flows before calling the work complete.
